scripts.dev: concurrently -n hive,bee,dash,bee-ui -c cyan,yellow,green,magenta "pnpm -C apps/hive-server dev" "pnpm -C apps/bee dev" "pnpm -C apps/hive-dash dev" "pnpm -C apps/bee-ui dev"
scripts.dev:server: concurrently -n hive,bee -c cyan,yellow "pnpm -C apps/hive-server dev" "pnpm -C apps/bee dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -C packages/shared build && pnpm -C apps/hive-dash build && pnpm -C apps/bee-ui build
